case_title: ML PRODUCTS INC. VS. THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-12-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ML PRODUCTS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PETITIONER ML PRODUCTS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ML PRODUCTS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ML PRODUCTS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT SOLUTIONS COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-20-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
